name: dual-ai-skills
description: Multi-model adversarial workflows for Claude Code: Claude + OpenAI Codex CLI (+ optionally Google Gemini) as independent critics on the same plan or diff.

plugins.name: dual-ai
plugins.description: Multi-model workflows for Claude Code: /dual-plan and /tri-plan (Claude drafts, one or two rival models critique until convergence), /dual-review (Claude + Codex review the same diff, merged into one adversarially-verified report), and /tri-review (Claude + Codex + Gemini on the same diff).
